name: hsp
description: Harness Server Protocol: one MCP plugin that selects the right LSP for the workspace

interface.shortDescription: Rust HSP workgroup and LSP broker
interface.longDescription: Harness Server Protocol exposes workgroup coordination, ticketing, build hooks, render memory, and language-server operations through a Rust MCP broker. It routes Python, C#, and Rust workspaces through the configured LSP chain while keeping the agent bus in one plugin.
